projectDescription: An Obsidian plugin that lets you translate any community plugin or theme into your language using AI-powered LLM translation and a visual AST editor — no coding required.
keyFeatures: Visual AST editor for safe, inline translation without touching source code
High-concurrency AI translation engine with support for 16+ LLM providers
Token & cost estimation before every translation batch
Local translation memory cache for zero-cost repeat translations
Non-destructive apply/restore system with automatic backups
Export and import translation packs for community sharing
Automatic update detection — re-applies saved translations when a plugin updates
Theme translation support alongside plugin translation
Cloud repository integration for discovering community translation packs
Immersive translation mode (IMT) for live UI overlay
publicApiSurface: Translation schema: PluginTranslationV1 (metadata + AST + regex dicts)
LLM provider profiles: LLMProfile (url, key, model, pricing)
Supported AI providers: OpenAI-compatible, Gemini, Ollama, DeepSeek, Zhipu, Moonshot, Aliyun, Baidu, ByteDance, Groq, SiliconFlow, OpenRouter, DeepInfra, Mistral, MiniMax, StepFun
Obsidian commands: i18n-translate (open panel), i18n-auto-manager (open automation tab)
Translation pack export/import: JSON file format
Cloud repo integration: configurable GitHub/Gitee repository URLs
Auto-manager settings: discovery, match strategy, auto-apply, check interval, trusted repos
